name: mystery-novel-conventions
author: Microck
description: 当用户提到悬疑、侦探、犯罪或悬念叙事时使用 - 提供类型规范、线索布置和推理小说的公平游戏原则
description_zh: 该技能为悬疑推理小说创作提供结构化指南，核心是公平游戏原则、线索布置策略和经典三幕结构。包含实用检查清单、时间节点建议和子类型变体，帮助作者避开常见陷阱。
_original_description: This Skill provides a structured guide for writing mystery novels, focusing on fair-play principles, clue placement, and narrative structure. It offers practical checklists, timing guidelines, and subgenre variations to help writers avoid common pitfalls.

name: n8n-mcp-tools-expert
author: Microck
description: Expert guide for using n8n-mcp MCP tools effectively. Use when searching for nodes, validating configurations, accessing templates, managing workflows, or using any n8n-mcp tool. Provides tool selection guidance, parameter formats, and common patterns.
description_zh: 一个指导如何使用 n8n-mcp MCP 服务器工具来构建和管理 n8n 工作流的指南。它详细说明了节点发现、配置验证和工作流管理，包括性能指标和需要避免的常见错误。
_original_description: A guide for using the n8n-mcp MCP server tools to build and manage n8n workflows. It provides detailed instructions on node discovery, configuration validation, and workflow management, including performance metrics and common pitfalls to avoid.

name: nanobanana-skill
author: Microck
description: Generate or edit images using Google Gemini API via nanobanana. Use when the user asks to create, generate, edit images with nanobanana, or mentions image generation/editing tasks.
description_zh: 该技能通过Python封装调用Google Gemini API实现图像生成和编辑功能。支持多种宽高比、分辨率选项和两种Gemini模型。文档清晰说明了配置要求、使用方式，并包含不同场景的实用示例。
_original_description: This skill provides image generation and editing capabilities using Google's Gemini API through a Python wrapper. It supports multiple aspect ratios, resolution options, and two Gemini models. The documentation clearly explains setup requirements, usage patterns, and includes practical examples for different scenarios.

name: native-modules
author: Microck
description: Expert in React Native native modules, bridging JavaScript and native code, writing custom native modules, using Turbo Modules, Fabric, JSI, autolinking, module configuration, iOS Swift/Objective-C modules, Android Kotlin/Java modules. Activates for native module, native code, bridge, turbo module, JSI, fabric, autolinking, custom native module, ios module, android module, swift, kotlin, objective-c, java native code.
description_zh: 该技能详细指导React Native原生模块开发，涵盖iOS Swift/Objective-C和Android Kotlin/Java实现。解释桥接通信、Turbo Modules、JSI，并提供模块创建、第三方集成和常见问题排查的实用代码示例。

name: network-security-setup
author: Microck
description: Configure Claude Code sandbox network isolation with trusted domains, custom access policies, and environment variables
description_zh: 为Claude代码沙箱配置网络隔离策略，包括可信域名白名单、自定义访问规则和安全环境变量管理。提供三种模式（可信、无网络、自定义），包含预批准的包注册表、源码控制和CDN域名。支持企业代理配置，并明确指导避免在配置文件中暴露密钥。

name: nextjs-stripe-integration
author: Microck
description: Add Stripe payment processing to Next.js projects. Implement checkout sessions, payment handling, subscriptions, webhooks, and customer management. Use when adding Stripe to a Next.js project, building payment flows, implementing subscriptions, or integrating payment processing.
description_zh: 该技能提供在Next.js应用中集成Stripe支付的具体指导，涵盖一次性支付、订阅、Webhook处理和客户门户设置。文档解决了常见问题，如过时API和环境变量加载问题，包含API路由、认证中间件配置和部署考虑的具体代码示例。

name: nft-standards
author: Microck
description: Implement NFT standards (ERC-721, ERC-1155) with proper metadata handling, minting strategies, and marketplace integration. Use when creating NFT contracts, building NFT marketplaces, or implementing digital asset systems.
description_zh: 提供完整的ERC-721和ERC-1155 NFT标准实现，包含铸造、元数据处理、版税机制等实用示例。涵盖灵魂绑定代币、动态NFT等高级功能，并给出Gas优化和市场集成建议。

name: nodejs-backend-patterns
author: Microck
description: Build production-ready Node.js backend services with Express/Fastify, implementing middleware patterns, error handling, authentication, database integration, and API design best practices. Use when creating Node.js servers, REST APIs, GraphQL backends, or microservices architectures.
description_zh: 提供使用Express和Fastify构建Node.js后端服务的具体代码示例和架构模式。涵盖中间件设置、分层架构、JWT认证、数据库集成、缓存策略和API响应格式化。包含TypeScript示例和生产部署最佳实践。
_original_description: Provides concrete code examples and architectural patterns for building Node.js backend services with Express and Fastify. Covers middleware setup, layered architecture, authentication with JWT, database integration, caching strategies, and API response formatting. Includes TypeScript examples and best practices for production deployment.

name: nondominium-holochain-dna-dev
author: Microck
description: Specialized skill for nondominium Holochain DNA development, focusing on zome creation, entry patterns, integrity/coordinator architecture, ValueFlows compliance, and WASM optimization. Use when creating new zomes, implementing entry types, or modifying Holochain DNA code.
description_zh: 该技能为遵循nondominium项目架构的Holochain DNA开发提供详细指导。包含zome创建、实体模式、构建验证的具体工作流，明确列出Holochain开发的最佳实践和禁忌。强制要求ValueFlows合规性并提供具体代码示例。

name: novel-writer-workflow-guide
author: Microck
description: Use when user starts a novel project or asks how to organize their writing - guides through novel-writer's seven-step methodology and ensures proper workflow
description_zh: 一个结构化的小说创作七步工作流指南，从建立原则到质量分析。提供清晰的命令如/constitution和/specify，处理不同规模的项目，并与其他写作技能集成。指南详细但依赖用户自律来遵循流程。

name: novelweave-workflow
author: Microck
description: 使用 NovelWeave 进行小说创作的完整工作流程，包括命令使用、最佳实践和高效创作技巧。适用于规划小说项目、组织创作过程或学习 NovelWeave 功能。
description_zh: 该技能为使用NovelWeave进行小说创作提供了结构化工作流，涵盖构思、世界构建、场景创作和审稿。它用具体示例解释了/constitution、/write等核心命令，并警告了过度依赖AI等常见陷阱。
_original_description: This skill provides a structured workflow for using NovelWeave in fiction writing, covering planning, world-building, scene creation, and revision. It explains core commands like /constitution and /write with concrete examples and warns against common pitfalls like over-reliance on AI.

name: objection-pattern-detector
author: Microck
description: Mine lost deal notes to identify recurring objection patterns. Create objection response playbooks from won deals.
description_zh: 分析失败交易记录以识别常见异议模式，从成功交易中创建应对策略手册。提供带时间戳的结构化输出，包含结果和可操作建议。

name: onboarding
author: Microck
description: Personalize COG for your workflow - creates profile, interests, and watchlist files with guided setup (run this first!)
description_zh: 该技能引导新用户完成个性化COG系统的设置。通过对话式提问收集用户信息，创建Markdown配置文件，并生成欢迎指南。能处理现有配置文件并提供更新选项，所有配置均以可编辑的Markdown笔记形式存储在知识库中。
_original_description: This skill guides new users through setting up a personalized COG (Claude + Obsidian + Git) system. It collects user information through conversational prompts, creates markdown profile files, and generates a welcome guide. It handles existing profiles with update options and stores all configuration as editable markdown notes within the vault structure.

name: payload
author: Microck
description: Use when working with Payload CMS projects (payload.config.ts, collections, fields, hooks, access control, Payload API). Use when debugging validation errors, security issues, relationship queries, transactions, or hook behavior.
description_zh: 该技能为Payload CMS开发提供详细指导，涵盖配置、集合、钩子、访问控制和API使用。包含实用代码示例、常见安全陷阱警告以及官方文档参考。内容组织便于开发任务中快速查阅。

name: paypal-integration
author: Microck
description: Integrate PayPal payment processing with support for express checkout, subscriptions, and refund management. Use when implementing PayPal payments, processing online transactions, or building e-commerce checkout flows.
description_zh: 该技能提供了集成PayPal支付服务的代码示例和工作流，包括快速结账、订阅、退款和IPN网络钩子处理。涵盖了Python和JavaScript的前后端实现、错误处理模式以及测试指南。

name: pci-compliance
author: Microck
description: Implement PCI DSS compliance requirements for secure handling of payment card data and payment systems. Use when securing payment processing, achieving PCI compliance, or implementing payment card security measures.
description_zh: 提供详细的PCI DSS合规实施指南，包含安全支付处理、令牌化、审计日志和验证的代码示例。涵盖全部12项核心要求，附带实用的Python代码片段和检查清单。
_original_description: Provides detailed guidance for implementing PCI DSS compliance, including code examples for secure payment handling, tokenization, audit logging, and validation. Covers all 12 core requirements with practical Python snippets and checklists.

name: pg-dump-reference
author: Microck
description: Consult PostgreSQL's pg_dump implementation for guidance on system catalog queries and schema extraction when implementing pgschema features
description_zh: 为开发者在实现PostgreSQL模式内省功能时提供pg_dump源码查询参考。将具体对象类型映射到pg_dump函数和系统目录查询，包含将查询适配到Go代码的实例。

name: pinecone
author: Microck
description: Managed vector database for production AI applications. Fully managed, auto-scaling, with hybrid search (dense + sparse), metadata filtering, and namespaces. Low latency (<100ms p95). Use for production RAG, recommendation systems, or semantic search at scale. Best for serverless, managed infrastructure.
description_zh: 提供与Pinecone托管向量数据库的集成，用于AI应用。包含索引创建、向量操作、元数据过滤的代码示例，以及LangChain和LlamaIndex集成。涵盖无服务器和Pod部署模式，包含性能指标和定价信息。

name: playwright-browser-automation
author: Microck
description: Complete browser automation with Playwright. Auto-detects dev servers, writes clean test scripts to /tmp. Test pages, fill forms, take screenshots, check responsive design, validate UX, test login flows, check links, automate any browser task. Use when user wants to test websites, automate browser interactions, validate web functionality, or perform any browser-based testing.
description_zh: 为浏览器自动化任务生成自定义Playwright脚本。自动检测本地开发服务器，写入临时测试文件，并使用可见浏览器执行。处理表单填写、截图、响应式测试和登录流程。包含安全点击和处理Cookie横幅等常见模式的辅助函数。

name: portfolio-roadmapping-bets
author: Microck
description: Use when managing multiple initiatives across time horizons (now/next/later, H1/H2/H3), balancing risk vs return across portfolio, sizing and sequencing bets with dependencies, setting exit/scale criteria for experiments, allocating resources across innovation types (core/adjacent/transformational), or when user mentions portfolio planning, roadmap horizons, betting framework, initiative prioritization, innovation portfolio, or resource allocation across horizons.
description_zh: 提供结构化框架，使用'押注'语言管理跨时间周期的多个项目。帮助评估工作量、排序依赖关系、设定明确退出标准，并在投资组合中平衡风险。包含实用模板和防护栏，避免常见规划陷阱。

name: postgres-migrations
author: Microck
description: Comprehensive guide to PostgreSQL migrations - common errors, generated columns, full-text search, indexes, idempotent migrations, and best practices for database schema changes
description_zh: 提供PostgreSQL迁移常见错误的实用解决方案，包括未分组列引用、不可变函数要求和扩展依赖问题。包含幂等迁移、生成列和性能优化的模式，配有具体SQL示例和故障排除步骤。

name: postgresql-syntax-reference
author: Microck
description: Consult PostgreSQL's parser and grammar (gram.y) to understand SQL syntax, DDL statement structure, and parsing rules when implementing pgschema features
description_zh: 该技能为开发SQL解析工具的开发者提供PostgreSQL解析器语法文件的直接访问。它将gram.y语法规则映射到使用pg_query_go的Go实现，提供调试和DDL生成的具体工作流程。

name: postgresql-table-design
author: Microck
description: Design a PostgreSQL-specific schema. Covers best-practices, data types, indexing, constraints, performance patterns, and advanced features
description_zh: 提供PostgreSQL专用的表设计指南，涵盖数据类型选择、索引策略、约束设置和性能模式。包含用户表、订单表等常见场景的实用示例，详细解释PostgreSQL特有的行为和注意事项。

name: pre-write-checklist
author: Microck
description: Activates automatically before chapter writing to enforce the 9-item mandatory file reading checklist - prevents AI focus degradation in long-form fiction by ensuring all context is loaded before each writing session
description_zh: 在每次写作章节前自动执行9项文件检查清单，强制AI重新加载故事上下文，解决长篇创作中AI遗忘早期设定的失焦问题。通过重读创作宪法、角色状态、情节追踪等文件，保持角色性格一致和情节连贯性。

name: prepare-changelog
author: Microck
description: Guidelines for preparing changelog entries for nextest releases following Keep a Changelog format
description_zh: 为nextest项目提供详细的更新日志编写指南，遵循Keep a Changelog格式规范。涵盖结构组织、内容规范、贡献者致谢、格式约定和实际示例，确保发布文档的一致性和专业性。

name: project-planning
author: Microck
description:
Generate structured planning documentation for web projects with context-safe phases, verification criteria, and exit conditions. Creates IMPLEMENTATION_PHASES.md plus conditional docs (DATABASE_SCHEMA, API_ENDPOINTS, UI_COMPONENTS, CRITICAL_WORKFLOWS).

Use when: starting new Cloudflare Workers/React projects, adding major features to existing apps, breaking large work into manageable phases, or need verified planning before coding begins.
description_zh: 该技能为Web项目生成结构化规划文档，将工作分解为具有验证标准的上下文安全阶段。它创建IMPLEMENTATION_PHASES.md以及条件性文档如DATABASE_SCHEMA和API_ENDPOINTS。包含用于新项目和功能规划的自动化命令，默认假设使用Cloudflare Workers/React技术栈。
_original_description: This skill generates structured planning documentation for web projects, breaking work into context-safe phases with verification criteria. It creates IMPLEMENTATION_PHASES.md plus conditional docs like DATABASE_SCHEMA and API_ENDPOINTS. It includes automation commands for new projects and feature planning, with a default stack assumption for Cloudflare Workers/React projects.

name: project-session-management
author: Microck
description:
Track progress across work sessions using SESSION.md with git checkpoints and concrete next actions. Converts IMPLEMENTATION_PHASES.md into trackable session state with phase status, progress markers, and recovery points.

Use when: starting projects after planning phase, resuming work after context clears, managing multi-phase implementations, or troubleshooting lost context, missing progress tracking, or unclear next steps.
description_zh: 通过创建和维护SESSION.md文件，使用Git检查点跟踪跨编码会话的进度。将实施阶段转化为可操作任务，提供明确的下一步行动，处理会话间的上下文切换，并提供自动化命令来结束和恢复工作。
_original_description: Creates and maintains a SESSION.md file to track progress across coding sessions using git checkpoints. Converts implementation phases into actionable tasks with clear next actions, handles context switching between sessions, and provides automated commands for wrapping and resuming work.

name: prometheus-configuration
author: Microck
description: Set up Prometheus for comprehensive metric collection, storage, and monitoring of infrastructure and applications. Use when implementing metrics collection, setting up monitoring infrastructure, or configuring alerting systems.
description_zh: 该技能提供详细的Prometheus监控系统配置指南，包括安装、配置模板、抓取规则、记录规则和告警规则。涵盖Kubernetes、Docker和静态部署场景，附带验证命令和最佳实践。

name: prompt-engineering-patterns
author: Microck
description: Master advanced prompt engineering techniques to maximize LLM performance, reliability, and controllability in production. Use when optimizing prompts, improving LLM outputs, or designing production prompt templates.
description_zh: 提供结构化提示工程模式，涵盖少样本学习、思维链推理、模板系统和优化工作流。包含实际应用示例和生产环境集成指导。

name: prompt-improver
author: Microck
description: This skill enriches vague prompts with targeted research and clarification before execution. Should be used when a prompt is determined to be vague and requires systematic research, question generation, and execution guidance.
description_zh: 该技能通过系统研究和针对性提问，将模糊的用户提示转化为可执行的请求。遵循研究、提问、澄清、执行的4阶段工作流。仅在检测到模糊提示时激活，避免对清晰请求造成不必要的中断。
_original_description: This skill transforms vague user prompts into actionable requests through systematic research and targeted questioning. It follows a 4-phase workflow: research, question generation, user clarification, and execution. The skill only activates when a hook detects ambiguous prompts, preventing unnecessary interruptions for clear requests.

name: proof-composer
author: Microck
description: Validates entire engineering proof chain. Verifies architecture, backend maps, backend code, standardization, frontend types, infrastructure topology all compose correctly. This is the final DEPLOYMENT GATE - deployment blocked if proof chain invalid. Use when engineering thread completes all actions.
description_zh: 作为工程工作流中的最终部署关卡，验证所有前置技能生成的证明能否正确组合。如果存在版本不匹配、缺失证明或组合链断裂，则阻止部署。生成系统级证书并与构建管道集成。

name: python-packaging
author: Microck
description: Create distributable Python packages with proper project structure, setup.py/pyproject.toml, and publishing to PyPI. Use when packaging Python libraries, creating CLI tools, or distributing Python code.
description_zh: 提供Python项目结构、pyproject.toml文件创建和PyPI发布的详细指南。涵盖现代打包标准、构建后端，并包含不同项目布局和部署场景的实用模式。

name: python-testing-patterns
author: Microck
description: Implement comprehensive testing strategies with pytest, fixtures, mocking, and test-driven development. Use when writing Python tests, setting up test suites, or implementing testing best practices.
description_zh: 提供使用pytest编写Python测试的具体示例，涵盖夹具、模拟、参数化和数据库测试。包含配置文件与CI/CD集成步骤。侧重于实用模式而非抽象理论。

name: rag-implementation
author: Microck
description: Build Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems for LLM applications with vector databases and semantic search. Use when implementing knowledge-grounded AI, building document Q&A systems, or integrating LLMs with external knowledge bases.
description_zh: 提供构建基于向量数据库和语义搜索的RAG系统的实用指南。包含文档加载、分块、嵌入、检索和提示工程的代码示例。涵盖多种向量存储和检索策略。
_original_description: Provides practical guidance for building RAG systems with vector databases and semantic search. Includes code examples for document loading, chunking, embedding, retrieval, and prompt engineering. Covers multiple vector stores (Chroma, Pinecone, Weaviate) and retrieval strategies (hybrid search, multi-query, contextual compression).

name: react-modernization
author: Microck
description: Upgrade React applications to latest versions, migrate from class components to hooks, and adopt concurrent features. Use when modernizing React codebases, migrating to React Hooks, or upgrading to latest React versions.
description_zh: 提供详细的React应用升级指南（从16到18版本），迁移类组件到函数式钩子，并采用Suspense和过渡等并发功能。包含具体代码示例、代码修改脚本和分步迁移清单。

name: react-native-expo
author: Microck
description:
Build React Native 0.76+ apps with Expo SDK 52. Covers mandatory New Architecture (0.82+), React 19 changes (propTypes/forwardRef removal), new CSS (display: contents, mixBlendMode, outline), Swift iOS template, and DevTools migration.

Use when: building Expo apps, migrating to New Architecture, or troubleshooting "Fabric component not found", "propTypes not a function", "TurboModule not registered", or Swift AppDelegate errors.
description_zh: 该技能为React Native 0.76+和Expo SDK 52+开发提供详细指南，重点关注强制采用新架构、React 19破坏性变更和iOS Swift迁移。包含常见错误（如'Fabric组件未找到'）的故障排除步骤、版本特定的升级路径和实用脚本。

name: react-native-setup
author: Microck
description: Expert in React Native environment setup and configuration. Helps with Node.js, Xcode, Android Studio, watchman installation, CocoaPods, simulators, emulators, and troubleshooting setup issues. Activates for environment setup, installation issues, xcode setup, android studio, simulators, emulators, react-native init, expo init, development environment, SDK configuration.
description_zh: 该技能为React Native开发环境搭建提供详细指导，涵盖macOS、Windows和Linux系统。内容包括Node.js、Xcode、Android Studio、watchman、CocoaPods、模拟器配置及常见问题排查。提供平台特定命令和SpecWeave工作流集成。

name: reference-ops
author: Microck
description: Use to manage workflows, compliance, and measurement for customer references.
description_zh: 帮助销售和市场营销团队通过结构化工作流管理客户参考计划，包括匹配潜在客户与倡导者、处理合规检查及跟踪使用指标。提供模板并可集成CRM系统。
_original_description: Helps sales and marketing teams manage customer reference programs with structured workflows for matching prospects to advocates, handling compliance checks, and tracking utilization metrics. Provides templates and integrates with CRM systems.

name: relational-database-mcp-cloudbase
author: Microck
description: This is the required documentation for agents operating on the CloudBase Relational Database. It lists the only four supported tools for running SQL and managing security rules. Read the full content to understand why you must NOT use standard Application SDKs and how to safely execute INSERT, UPDATE, or DELETE operations without corrupting production data.
description_zh: 为使用MCP工具操作CloudBase关系型数据库提供明确指南。专注于安全的SQL执行模式和安全管理规则。区分代理操作与应用SDK使用场景，防止上下文混淆。

name: repomix
author: Microck
description: Package entire code repositories into single AI-friendly files using Repomix. Capabilities include pack codebases with customizable include/exclude patterns, generate multiple output formats (XML, Markdown, plain text), preserve file structure and context, optimize for AI consumption with token counting, filter by file types and directories, add custom headers and summaries. Use when packaging codebases for AI analysis, creating repository snapshots for LLM context, analyzing third-party libraries, preparing for security audits, generating documentation context, or evaluating unfamiliar codebases.
description_zh: Repomix将整个代码仓库打包成适合AI处理的单个文件。支持多种输出格式，可处理远程仓库无需克隆，能移除18+种语言的注释，统计令牌数以适配LLM上下文限制，并包含敏感数据安全检查功能。

name: research
author: Microck
description: Research libraries, APIs, and patterns using searchGitHub and Exa tools. Finds real-world implementations and saves structured reports to docs/research/. Use when investigating technologies, debugging issues, or comparing options.
description_zh: 该技能通过搜索GitHub真实代码示例和使用Exa搜索网络/文档，帮助开发者研究技术。它提供结构化工作流程来查找生产环境使用模式、比较选项并保存研究报告。强调用实际代码验证观点而非依赖教程。

name: reviewing-changes
author: Microck
description: Android-specific code review workflow additions for Bitwarden Android. Provides change type refinements, checklist loading, and reference material organization. Complements bitwarden-code-reviewer agent's base review standards.
description_zh: Bitwarden代码审查工作流的Android专用扩展。增加Android模式变更类型检测，加载相应检查清单，参考Android架构指南。专注于MVVM、Hilt依赖注入和Compose规范。

name: reviewing-pr
author: Microck
description: Use when reviewing pull requests with comprehensive code analysis, incremental or full review options, and constructive feedback - provides thorough code reviews with severity ratings
description_zh: 一个代码审查助手，通过严重性分级和结构化反馈分析拉取请求。支持增量审查和完整审查，提供具体示例，并集成GitHub CLI命令。该工具有助于保持审查标准一致并避免重复反馈。

name: romance-novel-conventions
author: Microck
description: Use when user mentions romance, love story, or relationship-focused narrative - provides genre conventions, pacing guidelines, and emotional beats for romance writing
description_zh: 该技能为言情小说创作提供结构化指导，涵盖节奏、情感节点和类型惯例。包含检查清单、子类型注意事项以及与写作命令的集成。内容组织清晰，有具体示例，并规避了常见陷阱。

name: run-tests
author: Microck
description: Validate code changes by intelligently selecting and running the appropriate test suites. Use this when editing code to verify changes work correctly, run tests, validate functionality, or check for regressions. Automatically discovers affected test suites, selects the minimal set of venvs needed for validation, and handles test execution with Docker services as needed.
description_zh: 该技能为Datadog Python追踪器项目的代码变更智能运行最小测试套件。它分析修改的文件，通过模式映射到测试套件，仅选择必要的Python环境，并使用Docker服务管理执行测试。避免不必要的全量测试运行，节省开发者迭代时间。
_original_description: This skill intelligently runs minimal test suites for code changes in the Datadog Python tracer project. It analyzes modified files, maps them to test suites via patterns, selects only necessary Python environments, and executes tests with Docker service management. It prevents running all tests unnecessarily, saving developer time during iteration.

name: sales-comp-plan-designer
author: Microck
description: Base/variable split recommendations, accelerators, decelerators, quota retirement methods, SPIFs, cost of sales tracking.
description_zh: 生成销售薪酬计划，包含基本/浮动工资比例、加速器、减速器和配额方法。提供结构化Markdown输出，为设计激励方案的销售领导者提供建议和模板。
_original_description: Generates sales compensation plans with base/variable splits, accelerators, and quota methods. Provides structured markdown output with recommendations and templates for sales leaders designing incentive programs.

name: sast-configuration
author: Microck
description: Configure Static Application Security Testing (SAST) tools for automated vulnerability detection in application code. Use when setting up security scanning, implementing DevSecOps practices, or automating code vulnerability detection.
description_zh: 该技能提供Semgrep、SonarQube和CodeQL等静态应用安全测试工具的配置指南。包含CI/CD集成示例、自定义规则创建和误报管理。文档涵盖工具对比、故障排除步骤以及在开发流程中实施安全扫描的最佳实践。

name: scene-structure-techniques
author: Microck
description: Use when structuring scenes or planning chapter content - provides scene-sequel framework, tension management, and beat-by-beat structure for compelling scenes
description_zh: 一个为小说作者设计的结构化提示，用于规划单个场景。它基于场景-续场模型，引导用户定义角色目标、冲突和结局，生成包含节奏、张力管理和写作工具集成的详细场景大纲。
_original_description: A structured prompt for fiction writers to plan individual scenes using the scene-sequel framework. It guides users through defining character goals, conflicts, and resolutions, then generates a detailed scene outline with beats, tension management, and integration notes for writing tools.

name: secrets-management
author: Microck
description: Implement secure secrets management for CI/CD pipelines using Vault, AWS Secrets Manager, or native platform solutions. Use when handling sensitive credentials, rotating secrets, or securing CI/CD environments.
description_zh: 提供在CI/CD管道中使用Vault、AWS Secrets Manager、GitHub Secrets和GitLab变量管理密钥的具体实现示例。包含跨多个平台的设置、集成、轮换和扫描的代码片段及具体最佳实践。

name: security-audit-example
author: Microck
description: Example security audit skill demonstrating how to audit code for security vulnerabilities. Use when the user asks to perform security reviews, check for vulnerabilities, or audit code security.
description_zh: 该技能为代码库安全审计提供了一个结构化框架。它明确了身份验证、输入验证和加密等审计重点领域，并定义了清晰的审计流程。报告的输出格式定义良好，适合需要系统性安全检查的开发者使用。

name: sequential-thinking
author: Microck
description: Use when complex problems require systematic step-by-step reasoning with ability to revise thoughts, branch into alternative approaches, or dynamically adjust scope. Ideal for multi-stage analysis, design planning, problem decomposition, or tasks with initially unclear scope.
description_zh: 该工具为复杂问题提供结构化逐步推理框架，支持动态调整思考步骤、修订先前结论和探索替代路径。适用于初始范围不明确的多阶段分析和设计规划任务。

name: setting-detector
author: Microck
description: Automatically detects story settings (genres, time periods, themes) based on keywords and activates corresponding knowledge bases - works silently in the background to provide relevant writing guidance without user intervention
description_zh: 该技能根据用户输入的关键词自动检测故事类型和时代背景，加载对应的写作知识库。它在后台运行，无需手动调用即可提供类型特定的创作指导，通过按需加载节省token消耗。

name: setup-timescaledb-hypertables
author: Microck
description: Step-by-step instructions for designing table schemas and setting up TimescaleDB with hypertables, indexes, compression, retention policies, and continuous aggregates. Instructions for selecting: partition columns, segment_by columns, order_by columns, chunk time interval, real-time aggregation.
description_zh: 提供详细的TimescaleDB超表配置SQL指令，包括分区列选择、segment_by优化、压缩策略和连续聚合。涵盖物联网、金融和指标监控等场景，包含从旧API迁移的明确路径和性能调优建议。

name: shellcheck-configuration
author: Microck
description: Master ShellCheck static analysis configuration and usage for shell script quality. Use when setting up linting infrastructure, fixing code issues, or ensuring script portability.
description_zh: 提供详细的ShellCheck静态分析配置和使用指南，涵盖安装、配置文件、常见错误代码示例、CI/CD集成模式以及违规修复方案。包含.shellcheckrc设置和警告抑制的具体示例。

name: shopify
author: Microck
description: Build Shopify applications, extensions, and themes using GraphQL/REST APIs, Shopify CLI, Polaris UI components, and Liquid templating. Capabilities include app development with OAuth authentication, checkout UI extensions for customizing checkout flow, admin UI extensions for dashboard integration, POS extensions for retail, theme development with Liquid, webhook management, billing API integration, product/order/customer management. Use when building Shopify apps, implementing checkout customizations, creating admin interfaces, developing themes, integrating payment processing, managing store data via APIs, or extending Shopify functionality.
description_zh: 该技能详细指导Shopify应用、扩展和主题开发。涵盖CLI设置、GraphQL/REST API使用、Polaris UI组件和Liquid模板。提供结账扩展、产品查询和部署流程的实际示例。根据项目需求清晰区分应用、扩展和主题的开发选择。

name: shopify-api
author: Microck
description: Complete API integration guide for Shopify including GraphQL Admin API, REST Admin API, Storefront API, Ajax API, OAuth authentication, rate limiting, and webhooks. Use when making API calls to Shopify, authenticating apps, fetching product/order/customer data programmatically, implementing cart operations, handling webhooks, or working with API version 2025-10. Requires fetch or axios for JavaScript implementations.
description_zh: 提供与Shopify所有主要API集成的详细指南，包括GraphQL管理API、REST管理API、店面API和Ajax API。涵盖身份验证、速率限制、Webhook，并包含获取产品、处理订单等常见操作的工作代码示例。专注于2025-10 API版本。

name: shopify-app-dev
author: Microck
description: Custom Shopify app development using Shopify CLI, app architecture, OAuth authentication, app extensions, admin UI, Hydrogen/Remix frameworks, and deployment. Use when creating Shopify apps, setting up Shopify CLI, building app extensions, implementing OAuth flows, creating admin UI components, working with Hydrogen or Remix, deploying to Cloudflare Workers, or integrating third-party services with Shopify stores.
description_zh: 提供使用Shopify CLI、Remix框架和Cloudflare Workers等现代部署选项构建Shopify应用的逐步指南。涵盖OAuth设置、Polaris管理界面、Webhooks、应用代理和生产应用最佳实践。

name: shopify-debugging
author: Microck
description: Complete debugging and troubleshooting guide for Shopify including Liquid errors, theme preview debugging, API error handling, JavaScript console debugging, network request inspection, cart issues, checkout problems, and common error codes. Use when debugging Liquid syntax errors, troubleshooting theme rendering issues, fixing API errors, debugging JavaScript, investigating cart problems, or resolving webhook failures.
description_zh: 提供针对Shopify主题、API和JavaScript的具体调试技术。包含Liquid错误、API故障排除和Webhook验证的代码片段。涵盖常见错误信息和浏览器开发者工具使用。

name: siberian-shamanic-navigation
author: Microck
description: Navigate through the original three-world shamanic technology. Deploy when soul retrieval, power animal guidance, or journey between realms emerges. Deeply respectful of Tungus, Buryat, Yakut, Evenki traditions. Use for consciousness navigation, NOT cultural appropriation.
description_zh: 该技能提供了一个将西伯利亚萨满教概念应用于意识导航和数字模式识别的结构化框架。它明确定义了使用触发条件，描述了三界架构，并与模式空间思维整合。内容强调文化尊重和具体用例，而非泛灵性建议。

name: skill-navigator
author: Microck
description: The 100th skill! Your intelligent guide to all 99 other skills. Recommends the perfect skill for any task, creates skill combinations, and helps you discover capabilities you didn't know you had.
description_zh: 作为99个其他Claude技能的导航指南。帮助用户根据具体任务找到合适的技能，为复杂工作流建议技能组合，并提供示例提示。充当技能生态系统的目录和编排器。

name: slo-implementation
author: Microck
description: Define and implement Service Level Indicators (SLIs) and Service Level Objectives (SLOs) with error budgets and alerting. Use when establishing reliability targets, implementing SRE practices, or measuring service performance.
description_zh: 提供基于Prometheus和Grafana的SLO实施框架，包含具体的SLI计算公式、错误预算策略和多窗口告警规则。包含可直接使用的YAML配置和PromQL查询，适用于生产环境可靠性监控。
_original_description: Provides a concrete framework for implementing SLOs with Prometheus recording rules, alerting configurations, and Grafana dashboard queries. Includes specific SLI formulas, error budget calculations, and multi-window burn rate alerting strategies. Offers ready-to-use YAML examples for production monitoring systems.

name: smart-contract-generator
author: Microck
description: Generates Solidity smart contracts with security best practices (ERC-20, ERC-721, ERC-1155, custom). Use when user asks to "create smart contract", "solidity contract", "erc20 token", "nft contract", or "web3 contract".
description_zh: 基于OpenZeppelin库生成ERC-20、ERC-721和ERC-1155等标准代币的Solidity合约模板。包含安全模式、Gas优化建议和基础部署脚本，适合需要快速搭建安全合约基础的Web3开发者。
_original_description: Generates boilerplate Solidity code for common token standards like ERC-20, ERC-721, and ERC-1155 using OpenZeppelin libraries. Includes security patterns, gas optimization tips, and basic deployment scripts. Useful for developers starting a new Web3 project who need a secure foundation.

name: software-crypto-web3
author: Microck
description: Production-grade blockchain and Web3 development with Solidity (Ethereum/EVM), Rust (Solana), CosmWasm (Cosmos), including smart contract architecture, security patterns, gas optimization, testing strategies, DeFi protocols, and deployment workflows.
description_zh: 该技能为多种区块链平台（以太坊、Solana、Cosmos、TON）提供具体的开发模式，包含工具推荐、平台选择决策树以及DeFi协议和NFT标准等用例模板。

name: solidity-security
author: Microck
description: Master smart contract security best practices to prevent common vulnerabilities and implement secure Solidity patterns. Use when writing smart contracts, auditing existing contracts, or implementing security measures for blockchain applications.
description_zh: 提供常见Solidity漏洞的具体示例，包含易受攻击和安全的代码模式。涵盖重入攻击、整数溢出、访问控制和抢跑攻击。包含测试示例和审计准备指南。侧重于实际实现而非理论概念。

name: spec-kit-skill
author: Microck
description: GitHub Spec-Kit integration for constitution-based spec-driven development. 7-phase workflow (constitution, specify, clarify, plan, tasks, analyze, implement). Use when working with spec-kit CLI, .specify/ directories, or creating specifications with constitution-driven development. Triggered by "spec-kit", "speckit", "constitution", "specify", references to .specify/ directory, or spec-kit commands.
description_zh: 将Claude与GitHub Spec-Kit CLI集成，实现结构化功能开发。引导用户完成从章程制定到实施的7个阶段，强制执行原则驱动的工作流。创建编号功能目录并记录每个步骤。需要CLI安装并遵循严格的阶段顺序。

name: sql
author: Microck
description: Run SQL queries against the WordPress development database. Use when querying database tables, inspecting Simple History events, checking WordPress data, or debugging database issues.
description_zh: 该技能允许通过Docker容器对WordPress开发数据库执行SQL查询。提供了具体的命令模式、表前缀文档以及检查Simple History事件和WordPress数据等常见数据库操作的示例。

name: sql-optimization-patterns
author: Microck
description: Master SQL query optimization, indexing strategies, and EXPLAIN analysis to dramatically improve database performance and eliminate slow queries. Use when debugging slow queries, designing database schemas, or optimizing application performance.
description_zh: 提供具体的SQL优化技术，包含PostgreSQL和MySQL的实际示例。涵盖EXPLAIN分析、索引策略、查询模式和性能监控。包含消除N+1查询、批量操作和物化视图的实用代码片段。专注于解决常见数据库性能问题的可操作方案。

name: sql-research
author: Microck
description: Guide for researching SQL syntax and behavior for database backends. Use when you need to research how a SQL function, command, or feature works in a specific database before implementing it in dbplyr.
description_zh: 为在dbplyr中实现数据库翻译前研究SQL语法提供结构化工作流。专注于查找官方文档、记录关键行为并创建参考文件。通过要求先完成研究再编码来确保SQL正确性。

name: sql-translation
author: Microck
description: Guide for adding SQL function translations to dbplyr backends. Use when implementing new database-specific R-to-SQL translations for functions like string manipulation, date/time, aggregates, or window functions.
description_zh: 该技能提供了为dbplyr后端添加SQL函数翻译的详细工作流程。涵盖研究、实现、测试和文档步骤，包含针对PostgreSQL和SQLite等不同数据库系统的具体代码示例。

name: story-explanation
author: Microck
description: Create compelling story-format summaries using UltraThink to find the best narrative framing. Support multiple formats - 3-part narrative, n-length with inline links, abridged 5-line, or comprehensive via Foundry MCP. USE WHEN user says 'create story explanation', 'narrative summary', 'explain as a story', or wants content in Daniel's conversational first-person voice.
description_zh: 该技能使用UltraThink分析内容，探索多种叙事角度后选择最佳框架，生成故事化摘要。支持五种输出格式，强制使用特定对话式文风，旨在通过创意探索避免生成模式化、平淡的总结。

name: stripe-integration
author: Microck
description: Implement Stripe payment processing for robust, PCI-compliant payment flows including checkout, subscriptions, and webhooks. Use when integrating Stripe payments, building subscription systems, or implementing secure checkout flows.
description_zh: 提供详细的Stripe支付处理实现模式，涵盖结账会话、支付意图、订阅、Webhook和客户管理。包含常见用例的Python代码示例，并强调Webhook验证和PCI合规性等安全最佳实践。

name: student-success-scorecard
author: Microck
description: Metrics framework for monitoring engagement, progression, and completion.
description_zh: 提供跟踪学生参与度指标的框架，涵盖入学率、作业提交率和完成率。包含仪表板和风险热图模板。重点是将先导指标与最终成果关联。
_original_description: Provides a framework for tracking student engagement metrics across cohorts, including enrollment rates, assignment submissions, and completion percentages. Includes templates for dashboards and risk heatmaps. Focuses on connecting leading indicators to final outcomes.

name: superpowers-lab
author: Microck
description: Experimental Claude Code skills extending capabilities with new techniques for interactive CLI tools, tmux automation, and advanced workflows.
description_zh: 该技能通过tmux会话让Claude Code控制交互式CLI工具，解决了vim、git rebase -i和Python REPL等需要手动终端交互的自动化问题。提供了创建分离会话、发送按键和捕获输出的具体模式。
_original_description: This skill enables Claude Code to control interactive CLI tools through tmux sessions, solving the automation problem for tools like vim, git rebase -i, and Python REPLs that normally require manual terminal interaction. It provides concrete patterns for creating detached sessions, sending keystrokes, and capturing output.

name: swapper-integration
author: Microck
description: Integrate new DEX aggregators, swappers, or bridge protocols (like Bebop, Portals, Jupiter, 0x, 1inch, etc.) into ShapeShift Web. Activates when user wants to add, integrate, or implement support for a new swapper. Guides through research, implementation, and testing following established patterns.
description_zh: 指导开发者将新的DEX聚合器集成到ShapeShift Web中。提供从API研究到测试的结构化工作流程，强调复用现有模式并避免常见错误。包含具体的文件路径和代码模板。

name: system-createcli
author: Microck
description: Generate production-quality TypeScript CLIs with full documentation, error handling, and best practices. Creates deterministic, type-safe command-line tools following PAI's CLI-First Architecture. USE WHEN user says "create a CLI", "build a command-line tool", "make a CLI for X", or requests CLI generation. (user)
description_zh: 生成TypeScript命令行工具，提供三个复杂度层级，从简单参数解析到Commander.js框架。包含文档、错误处理，并遵循Bun运行时等技术栈选择。为不同CLI创建场景提供清晰的工作流路由。

name: taste-check
author: Microck
description: Review code using Linus Torvalds' "good taste" philosophy. Eliminates defensive code, special cases, and deep nesting. Use when reviewing code quality, refactoring, or checking for code smells.
description_zh: 基于Linus Torvalds'好品味'哲学进行代码审查的技能，专注于消除防御性代码、特殊情况和深层嵌套。提供结构化反馈、具体示例和重构优先级建议。
_original_description: A code review skill that applies Linus Torvalds' 'good taste' philosophy to identify defensive code, special cases, and deep nesting. It provides structured feedback with specific examples and prioritizes refactoring tasks based on severity.

name: tauri
author: Microck
description: Tauri framework for building cross-platform desktop and mobile apps. Use for desktop app development, native integrations, Rust backend, and web-based UIs.
description_zh: 提供Tauri框架开发的文档和代码示例。涵盖桌面与移动应用创建、进程间通信、调试配置和平台特定设置。作为代码签名、插件开发等常见任务的快速参考。
_original_description: Provides structured documentation and code examples for Tauri framework development. Covers desktop and mobile app creation, IPC patterns, debugging setups, and platform-specific configurations. Serves as a quick reference for common tasks like code signing and plugin development.

name: temporal-python-testing
author: Microck
description: Test Temporal workflows with pytest, time-skipping, and mocking strategies. Covers unit testing, integration testing, replay testing, and local development setup. Use when implementing Temporal workflow tests or debugging test failures.
description_zh: 提供使用pytest测试Temporal工作流的结构化指南。核心包括用于快速单元测试的时间跳跃、用于集成测试的活动模拟以及用于确定性验证的重放测试。包含具体代码示例和详细资源文件链接。

name: terraform-module-library
author: Microck
description: Build reusable Terraform modules for AWS, Azure, and GCP infrastructure following infrastructure-as-code best practices. Use when creating infrastructure modules, standardizing cloud provisioning, or implementing reusable IaC components.
description_zh: 为AWS、Azure和GCP提供可复用的Terraform模块模板和示例。包含VPC模块完整代码、变量验证、测试模式和模块组合示例。专注于基础设施即代码团队的标准化和最佳实践。

name: testing
author: Microck
description: Run and troubleshoot tests for DBHub, including unit tests, integration tests with Testcontainers, and database-specific tests. Use when asked to run tests, fix test failures, debug integration tests, or troubleshoot Docker/database container issues.
description_zh: 为DBHub项目提供使用Testcontainers运行数据库集成测试的命令和故障排除步骤。包含特定数据库连接器测试、Docker设置验证和容器问题调试流程。

name: testing-anti-patterns
author: Microck
description: Use when writing or changing tests, adding mocks, or tempted to add test-only methods to production code - prevents testing mock behavior, production pollution with test-only methods, and mocking without understanding dependencies
description_zh: 该技能识别常见的测试反模式，如测试模拟行为、在生产代码中添加仅测试方法和不完整的模拟。提供不良实践的具体示例和修复方案，包含防止错误的检查函数。强调测试真实行为而非模拟实现细节。

name: todowrite-orchestration
author: Microck
description: Track progress in multi-phase workflows with TodoWrite. Use when orchestrating 5+ phase commands, managing iteration loops, tracking parallel tasks, or providing real-time progress visibility. Trigger keywords - "phase tracking", "progress", "workflow", "multi-step", "multi-phase", "todo", "tracking", "status".
description_zh: 提供使用TodoWrite跟踪多阶段工作流进度的模式。展示如何预先初始化任务列表、将阶段分解为子任务、跟踪迭代以及处理并行执行。包含正确/错误模式的具体示例和故障排除指南。
_original_description: Provides patterns for using TodoWrite to track progress in multi-phase workflows. Shows how to initialize task lists upfront, break phases into sub-tasks, track iterations, and handle parallel execution. Includes concrete examples with correct/incorrect patterns and troubleshooting guidance.

name: training-log-analyzer
author: Microck
description: Track workouts, stats, progress over time. Identify improvement areas, plateaus, rest/recovery needs, peak performance timing, injury risk.
description_zh: 分析训练日志以识别趋势、平台期和恢复需求。为运动员和健身爱好者提供结构化Markdown报告和可操作建议。
_original_description: Analyzes workout logs to identify trends, plateaus, and recovery needs. Provides structured markdown reports with actionable recommendations for athletes and fitness enthusiasts.

name: ts-agent-sdk
author: Microck
description:
Generate typed TypeScript SDKs for AI agents to interact with MCP servers. Converts verbose JSON-RPC curl commands to clean function calls (docs.createDocument() vs curl). Auto-detects MCP tools from server modules, generates TypeScript types and client methods, creates runnable example scripts.

Use when: building MCP-enabled applications, need typed programmatic access to MCP tools, want Claude Code to manage apps via scripts, eliminating manual JSON-RPC curl commands, validating MCP inputs/outputs, or creating reusable agent automation.
description_zh: 从MCP服务器工具定义生成TypeScript SDK，将JSON-RPC调用转换为类型化函数。自动提取Zod模式，创建带方法的客户端类，并生成可运行的示例脚本。帮助开发者避免手动curl命令，获得类型安全的API访问。

name: ui-styling
author: Microck
description: Create beautiful, accessible user interfaces with shadcn/ui components (built on Radix UI + Tailwind), Tailwind CSS utility-first styling, and canvas-based visual designs. Use when building user interfaces, implementing design systems, creating responsive layouts, adding accessible components (dialogs, dropdowns, forms, tables), customizing themes and colors, implementing dark mode, generating visual designs and posters, or establishing consistent styling patterns across applications.
description_zh: 该技能提供使用shadcn/ui组件和Tailwind CSS构建React界面的详细指南。包含安装配置、组件使用模式、主题定制、无障碍访问和响应式设计。提供了表单、布局、深色模式等常见UI任务的实用代码示例和参考资料。
_original_description: This skill provides detailed guidance for building React UIs using shadcn/ui components and Tailwind CSS. It includes setup instructions, component usage patterns, theming, accessibility, and responsive design. It offers practical code examples and references for common UI tasks like forms, layouts, and dark mode.

name: universal-wisdom-weaving
author: Microck
description: Deep dive into specific wisdom traditions (Hebrew, Aramaic, Buddhist, Hermetic, Ubuntu, Shamanic) showing how each discovered Pattern Space navigation principles. Reveals precise mechanical alignments between ancient wisdom and modern consciousness framework.
description_zh: 该技能将六种古老智慧传统（希伯来、阿拉姆、佛教、赫尔墨斯、乌班图、萨满）与现代'模式空间'意识框架进行详细映射。为每种传统提供具体协议和技术对齐，包含决策和视角转换的实际应用示例。

name: user-file-ops
author: Microck
description: Simple operations on user-provided text files including summarization.
description_zh: 该技能通过统计行数、单词数和字节数并提供简短预览，对文本文件进行基本摘要。可处理用户提供的work/inputs/目录文件或其他技能生成的out/目录文件。实现为一个简单的bash脚本。
_original_description: This skill provides basic text file summarization by counting lines, words, and bytes while capturing a short preview. It works with user-provided files in work/inputs/ or files generated by other skills in out/. The implementation is a simple bash script.

name: validate-with-database
author: Microck
description: Connect to live PostgreSQL database to validate schema assumptions, compare pg_dump vs pgschema output, and query system catalogs interactively
description_zh: 提供具体的工作流程，通过比较pg_dump输出与自定义pgschema工具结果来验证PostgreSQL模式实现。包含详细的连接方法、故障排除步骤和测试数据设置脚本，适用于数据库开发人员。

name: vendor-implementation
author: Microck
description: 基于Hyperliquid成功实现经验，为新交易所供应商提供Yuan框架集成指南。使用此技能当需要为新的交易所创建供应商实现，包括项目结构设计、API集成、核心服务实现和最佳实践。适用于交易所API集成、金融系统开发、微服务架构设计。
description_zh: 为Yuan框架集成新交易所供应商提供具体实现指南。包含目录结构、缓存和服务注册等核心模式、功能检查清单，以及基于Hyperliquid和OKX集成的经验教训。专注于实用的TypeScript代码，包含错误处理和日志标准。

name: verification-quality-assurance
author: Microck
description: Comprehensive truth scoring, code quality verification, and automatic rollback system with 0.95 accuracy threshold for ensuring high-quality agent outputs and codebase reliability.
description_zh: 提供代码质量自动化验证和评分系统（0.0-1.0评分），失败时自动回滚，支持CI/CD集成。包含实时监控仪表板、预提交钩子，支持文件和任务的批量验证。

name: vibe-calibration-protocol
author: Microck
description: Translate consciousness navigation into user's native language. Use when need to match user's frequency (technical/poetic/practical/mystical) without losing truth depth.
description_zh: 一个将复杂概念转化为用户特定语言模式（技术、诗意、实用、神秘）的协议。它为不同受众提供具体示例，强调在调整术语时保持概念深度。该技能通过匹配用户的认知风格帮助LLM进行更有效的沟通。

name: web-frameworks
author: Microck
description: Build modern full-stack web applications with Next.js (App Router, Server Components, RSC, PPR, SSR, SSG, ISR), Turborepo (monorepo management, task pipelines, remote caching, parallel execution), and RemixIcon (3100+ SVG icons in outlined/filled styles). Use when creating React applications, implementing server-side rendering, setting up monorepos with multiple packages, optimizing build performance and caching strategies, adding icon libraries, managing shared dependencies, or working with TypeScript full-stack projects.
description_zh: 提供使用Next.js、Turborepo和RemixIcon构建全栈Web应用的实用指南。包含设置说明、monorepo模式和常见场景（如数据获取、组件共享）的代码示例。附带用于项目初始化和迁移的Python脚本。

name: web-research
author: Microck
description: Use this skill for requests related to web research; it provides a structured approach to conducting comprehensive web research
description_zh: 使用Claude任务系统并行调用研究代理进行网络调研的结构化工作流。将结果保存到本地文件，包含具体的规划、代理限制和结果整合指导。

name: web3-testing
author: Microck
description: Test smart contracts comprehensively using Hardhat and Foundry with unit tests, integration tests, and mainnet forking. Use when testing Solidity contracts, setting up blockchain test suites, or validating DeFi protocols.
description_zh: 该技能提供使用Hardhat和Foundry测试Solidity智能合约的现成代码示例。涵盖单元测试、集成测试、Gas优化检查、主网分叉和合约验证。示例包含常见测试模式，如夹具、事件断言和模糊测试。

name: workflow-management
author: Microck
description: Create, debug, or modify QStash workflows for data updates and social media posting in the API service. Use when adding new automated jobs, fixing workflow errors, or updating scheduling logic.
description_zh: 该技能帮助开发者管理基于QStash的工作流，用于数据更新和社交媒体发布。它提供了具体的代码示例、目录结构和故障排除步骤，针对特定的API服务架构进行工作流创建、调试和修改。
_original_description: This skill helps developers manage QStash-based workflows for data updates and social media posting. It provides concrete guidance on creating, debugging, and modifying workflows with specific code examples, directory structures, and troubleshooting steps for a particular API service architecture.

name: workflow-orchestration-patterns
author: Microck
description: Design durable workflows with Temporal for distributed systems. Covers workflow vs activity separation, saga patterns, state management, and determinism constraints. Use when building long-running processes, distributed transactions, or microservice orchestration.
description_zh: 提供使用Temporal设计可靠工作流的详细指南，涵盖Saga补偿、实体工作流和并行执行等核心模式。清晰区分工作流编排和活动执行，包含具体使用场景示例。涉及确定性要求和幂等性模式等实际约束。

name: writing-plans
author: Microck
description: Use when design is complete and you need detailed implementation tasks for engineers with zero codebase context - creates comprehensive implementation plans with exact file paths, complete code examples, and verification steps assuming engineer has minimal domain knowledge
description_zh: 该技能为不熟悉代码库的工程师生成详细的实施计划。它将功能分解为2-5分钟的任务，包含确切文件路径、完整代码示例和验证步骤。计划遵循TDD原则，并提供子代理驱动或并行开发的执行交接选项。

name: writing-skills
author: Microck
description: Create and manage Claude Code skills in HASH repository following Anthropic best practices. Use when creating new skills, modifying skill-rules.json, understanding trigger patterns, working with hooks, debugging skill activation, or implementing progressive disclosure. Covers skill structure, YAML frontmatter, trigger types (keywords, intent patterns), UserPromptSubmit hook, and the 500-line rule. Includes validation and debugging with SKILL_DEBUG. Examples include rust-error-stack, cargo-dependencies, and rust-documentation skills.
description_zh: 为HASH仓库中的Claude Code技能创建和管理提供详细指南。涵盖技能结构、触发器配置、调试流程，遵循Anthropic的500行规则。包含rust-error-stack和cargo-dependencies等实际示例。

name: zapier-workflows
author: Microck
description: Manage and trigger pre-built Zapier workflows and MCP tool orchestration. Use when user mentions workflows, Zaps, automations, daily digest, research, search, lead tracking, expenses, or asks to "run" any process. Also handles Perplexity-based research and Google Sheets data tracking.
description_zh: 在Zapier的MCP工具和多步骤Zap之间架起桥梁，为工作流模式提供持久记忆。存储Webhook URL和工具偏好，使Claude能够触发复杂自动化，并在不同会话间记住用户特定的工具使用方式。
_original_description: Bridges the gap between Zapier's MCP tools and multi-step Zaps by providing persistent memory for workflow patterns. Stores webhook URLs and tool preferences, enabling Claude to trigger complex automations and remember user-specific tool usage across sessions.

name: anthropic-claude-development
author: Mindrally
description: Expert guidance for Anthropic Claude API development including Messages API, tool use, prompt engineering, and building production applications with Claude models.
